products.name: Wide-Brim Wool Hat
products.description: Wide-brim felt hat with a grosgrain band.

enrichment.value: A structured wide brim frames the face and finishes tailored looks instantly.

products.name: Leather Card Holder
products.description: Slim four-slot card holder in grained leather.

enrichment.value: Slim four-slot design carries the essentials without bulk — a perfect gift.

products.name: Tapered Pleated Trousers
products.description: Single-pleat tapered trousers in a soft wool blend.

enrichment.value: A single forward pleat adds room through the thigh while the taper keeps it sharp.

products.name: Merino Crewneck Sweater
products.description: Fine-gauge extra-fine merino crewneck.

enrichment.value: Extra-fine 18.5-micron merino is breathable, odour-resistant and never itchy.

products.name: High-Rise Wide Trousers
products.description: Fluid high-rise trousers with a pressed crease and wide leg.

enrichment.value: A high rise and pressed crease lengthen the leg for an elegant, elongated stance.

products.name: Woven Bucket Bag
products.description: Hand-woven leather bucket bag with a drawstring closure.

enrichment.value: Each bag is hand-woven from a single hide — no two are exactly alike.

products.name: Structured Top-Handle Bag
products.description: Architectural top-handle bag in grained leather with gold hardware.

enrichment.value: A rigid frame keeps its sculpted shape; scales from desk to dinner.

products.name: Silk Twill Scarf
products.description: 90cm silk twill scarf with a hand-drawn botanical print.

enrichment.value: Hand-rolled edges and saturated screen-print colour make it a versatile statement piece.

products.name: Belted Trench Coat
products.description: Water-resistant cotton-gabardine trench with storm flap.

enrichment.value: Tightly woven gabardine sheds light rain while the belt sculpts the waist.
Storm flap, gun yoke, horn buttons

products.name: Structured Wool Blazer
products.description: Double-faced wool blazer with peak lapels and a sharp shoulder.

enrichment.value: Sharp peak lapel and roped shoulder give an instantly tailored, elongating line.

products.name: Canvas Low-Top Sneaker
products.description: Clean organic-canvas low-top on a vulcanised sole.

enrichment.value: A minimal vulcanised low-top goes with everything and breaks in fast.

products.name: Cashmere Ribbed Turtleneck
products.description: Grade-A cashmere turtleneck in a chunky 7-gauge rib.

enrichment.value: Grade-A long-fibre cashmere resists pilling and holds its shape season after season.

products.name: Quilted Liner Jacket
products.description: Diamond-quilted liner jacket, packable and warm.

enrichment.value: Lightweight thermal fill packs into its own pocket — ideal transitional layering.

products.name: Knee-High Leather Boot
products.description: Sleek knee-high boot in supple calf leather.

enrichment.value: A close-fitting shaft and stacked heel make a sleek, elongating statement.

products.name: Suede Loafer
products.description: Italian suede penny loafer with a leather sole.

enrichment.value: Soft Italian suede over a hand-stitched apron toe — dressy yet supremely comfortable.
Brush and protect with suede spray

products.name: Leather Chelsea Boot
products.description: Hand-lasted Chelsea boot in polished calf leather.

enrichment.value: Hand-lasted calf leather and a Goodyear welt mean these can be resoled for years.

products.name: Leather Derby Shoe
products.description: Open-laced Derby in hand-polished calf leather.

enrichment.value: An open-lace Derby is versatile from boardroom to evening and easy to fit.

products.name: Block Heel Sandal
products.description: Strappy leather sandal on a walkable block heel.

enrichment.value: A 65mm block heel gives height with all-day stability and comfort.

products.name: Breton Stripe Tee
products.description: Classic Breton-stripe long-sleeve in mid-weight cotton.

enrichment.value: The timeless Breton stripe is a wardrobe anchor that pairs with anything.

products.name: Pointed Ballet Flat
products.description: Pointed leather ballet flat with a delicate ankle strap.

enrichment.value: A pointed toe elongates the leg while the strap keeps the flat secure.

products.name: Heavyweight Boxy Tee
products.description: Structured 240gsm boxy tee that holds its shape.

enrichment.value: Dense 240gsm jersey gives a premium structured drape with zero cling.

products.name: Oxford Button-Down Shirt
products.description: Washed Oxford-cloth button-down with a soft roll collar.

enrichment.value: Textured Oxford cloth is durable, breathable and softens with every wash.
Roll collar, box pleat, locker loop

products.name: Pima Cotton Crew Tee
products.description: Buttery Pima cotton crew tee with a clean neckline.

products.name: Striped Cotton Shirt
products.description: Fine-stripe cotton shirt with a cutaway collar.

enrichment.value: A cutaway collar and fine yarn-dyed stripe read sharp under a blazer.

products.name: Linen Camp Shirt
products.description: Breathable linen camp-collar shirt for warm days.

products.name: Satin Slip Skirt
products.description: Bias satin slip skirt with a fluid fall.

products.name: Poplin Oversized Shirt
products.description: Crisp cotton poplin shirt with a relaxed drop shoulder.

enrichment.value: Crisp compact-weave poplin holds a clean line and layers effortlessly.

products.name: A-Line Denim Skirt
products.description: Rigid-denim A-line mini with a raw hem.

enrichment.value: Structured rigid denim holds a clean A-line and softens with wear.

products.name: Off-Shoulder Blouse
products.description: Poplin off-shoulder blouse with volume sleeves.

enrichment.value: An elasticated off-shoulder neckline and full sleeves frame the collarbone.

products.name: Pleated Midi Skirt
products.description: Sunburst-pleated midi skirt with fluid movement.

enrichment.value: Permanent sunburst pleats create dramatic movement that photographs beautifully.

products.name: Silk Camisole Top
products.description: Bias silk camisole with delicate adjustable straps.

products.name: Ruched Jersey Top
products.description: Fitted stretch-jersey top with side ruching.

enrichment.value: Side ruching creates a flattering line and gentle stretch moves with you.

products.name: Floral Tea Dress
products.description: Ditsy-floral tea dress with a shirred bodice and tiered skirt.

enrichment.value: A shirred bodice gives a forgiving fit while the tiered skirt moves beautifully.

products.name: Slip Satin Dress
products.description: Minimal bias slip dress in fluid satin.

enrichment.value: A clean bias cut skims the body — timeless minimalism that dresses up or down.

products.name: Wrap Midi Dress
products.description: True-wrap midi dress in a soft drapey crepe.

enrichment.value: The adjustable true-wrap cinches the waist and adapts to every body.

products.name: Silk Charmeuse Maxi Dress
products.description: Bias-cut mulberry silk maxi with a fluid drape and cowl back.
